title: After giving away billions to charity, MacKenzie Scott says, ‘small acts of kindness matter’
summary_full: MacKenzie Scott, despite donating billions, champions everyday generosity. She highlights how small, consistent acts of kindness by ordinary people collectively shape communities, often overlooked amidst large-scale philanthropy. Research supports this, showing kindness boosts happiness and spreads prosocial behavior, proving individual care sustains systemic change and fosters lasting impact.
